LJCPersons.summary: Represents a strongly typed collection of objects, indexed by a combination of ParentID and Name.

DefaultCtor.summary: Initializes a new, empty instance of the class.

CopyCtor.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class that is a deep copy of the specified collection.

Clone.summary: Creates a deep copy of the current collection.
Clone.returns: A new object that is a deep copy of this instance.

Add.summary: Adds a new object to the collection using the specified values.
Add.param: The foreign key to the parent object.
The name of the person (part of the unique key).
Add.exception: Thrown if a person with the same ParentID and Name already exists.

AddObject.summary: Adds the specified object to the collection.
AddObject.exception: Thrown if a person with the same ParentID and Name already exists.

Retrieve.summary: Searches for and retrieves a object with the matching ParentID and Name.
Retrieve.param: The foreign key of the person to retrieve.
The name of the person to retrieve.
Retrieve.returns: The object if found; otherwise, null.

Remove.summary: Removes a object from the collection using the specified ParentID and Name.
Remove.param: The foreign key of the person to remove.
The name of the person to remove.
